World Building:

- LockedDoor with keypad display (unlocks after 3 correct answers)

Engine Updates:
- Add GlowLayer for interactive object highlights
- hideDefaultGround() method for zone loading

GameCanvas Integration:
- Load DFIR Lab zone on game start
- Show "Press E" prompt when near objects
- Support for question binding to terminals
